name: team field with matchup_opponent_type param
description: Test case for team field with matchup_opponent_type param
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE'), "t94907c627d9e8043f3e5e9674d21d3c0" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "team", count(distinct "nfl_plays"."esbid") as "rate_type_total_count" from "nfl_plays" group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t6af0f4b72eb62849047770e3601d77d4" as (select "year", "week", v as nfl_team, h as game_opponent, true as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2026_PRE_WEEK_0') and h IN ('WAS', 'ARI', 'LAR') union select "year", "week", h as nfl_team, v as game_opponent, false as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2026_PRE_WEEK_0') and v IN ('WAS', 'ARI', 'LAR')), "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1" as (select "nfl_plays"."def" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."def"), "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1_team_stats" as (select "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1"."nfl_team", sum(t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1" group by "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", CAST(t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1_team_stats.team_pass_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t94907c627d9e8043f3e5e9674d21d3c0.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "t94907c627d9e8043f3e5e9674d21d3c0" on "t94907c627d9e8043f3e5e9674d21d3c0"."team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" inner join "t6af0f4b72eb62849047770e3601d77d4" on "t6af0f4b72eb62849047770e3601d77d4"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" left join "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1_team_stats" on "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", "t183313d59003abc75b43b4223f7488e1_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", t94907c627d9e8043f3e5e9674d21d3c0.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
